data.title: Bill Gates' Concerns, Nvidia' Leap In Genetic Research, Elon Musk's Grok Beats OpenAI's ChatGPT, And More: This Week In AI
data.description: The week was abuzz with news from the tech world, with AI in the spotlight. Bill Gates warned of challenges for future generations, while Nvidia and Alibaba made strides in assistive tech and AI.

data.title: Author of Upcoming Elon Musk Biography Questions His 'Intellectual Achievements'
data.description: Elon Musk's intellectual abilities have been called into question by his biographer, Seth Abramson. Abramson has disputed the widely held belief of Musk's intellectual achievements, asserting that there is no substantial evidence to support such claims.

data.title: Cardone Exits XRP, Dogecoin Millionaire's Conviction Plays, Schiff's Concerns, Pepe Bull's Predictions, And Musk's Dogecoin Endorsement: This Week In Crypto
data.description: The week was a rollercoaster ride in the world of cryptocurrency. From Gary Cardone exiting his XRP position to Elon Musk embracing his meme status with Dogecoin  (CRYPTO: DOGE), the crypto market was buzzing with activity. Here’s a quick round-up of the top stories.

data.title: Apple's iPhone 16E Launch, US Investment Pledge, Potential Price Hikes, And More: This Week In Appleveres
data.description: Apple makes headlines with new budget iPhone, US investment pledge, revenue boost prediction, possible price increase, and wireless charging for iPhone 17 Pro.

data.title: Trump's Tax Plans, Gold Nears $3000, And Ray Dalio's Solution To America's Debt Crisis: This Week In Economics
data.description: Trump's tax proposals, gold nearing $3000, and Ray Dalio's plan to address debt crisis are top economic stories. Abolishing IRS and tax cuts criticized.
